source.title: A Harmony of the Gospels for Students of the Life of Christ
source.rights_note: Public domain. Harmony arrangement first published by John A. Broadus (1893); revised by A. T. Robertson (1922). Full text available from Project Gutenberg #36264. Section titles, numbering, and scripture references are Robertson's own. See docs/content-rights.md §3.

conventions.gospel_event_id: Stable ID derived from Robertson's own section numbers: "r1922-" + zero-padded section number (e.g. r1922-042 for §42). Sections 128a and 128b use their Robertson designations verbatim. IDs are permanent; do not renumber.
conventions.scripture_refs: Each ref is a structured object: {book, chapter_start, verse_start, chapter_end, verse_end, display}. verse_start/verse_end are null for whole-chapter ranges. book uses full English name.
conventions.phase_fields: phase and sub_phase are null in this file. Phase mapping (to 5 SonLife phases) is deferred to issue #21 (ministry-discernment + theological-review). phase_mapping_status="pending" on all events.
